steps.observed: Login form displayed with email/password fields

steps.action: View table of bookings - look for existing booking
steps.observed: Found booking ID 09273b89-ab97-40cd-9218-c92f179cf6e7 (Matricula de Vehiculo, Maria Garcia, 2026-04-20 08:00-08:45, confirmed status)

steps.action: Click 'Usar' button to select the booking
steps.observed: Action buttons visible: Confirmar, Ver capacidad, Release, Preview reasignación, Reasignar
Button clicked successfully, no error displayed
Button clicked successfully, no error displayed

steps.expected: Reportes page loads with series section
steps.observed: Page loaded at /admin/reportes with series section visible

steps.action: Scroll to view 'Series de reserva administrativa' section
steps.expected: Series form and instance table visible
steps.observed: Series form visible with: Regla RRULE, Fecha para slot base, Slot base, Funcionario, Inicio serie, Fin serie, Notas, Crear serie buttons; Instance filter dropdown
Instance table shows columns: ID, Activa, Instancias activas, Notas. Text: 'No hay serie seleccionada.' indicates no series currently selected/active.

steps.action: Check if series exist (look in filter dropdown)
steps.observed: Filter dropdown shows options: Todas, Activas, Inactivas. No pre-existing series instance data visible in table since no series is selected.

steps.expected: Form to create series is present
steps.observed: Series creation form is fully rendered with all fields (RRULE rule, base date, base slot, staff, start/end dates, notes) and 'Crear serie' button. UI allows creating new series.

frictions.description: Page waitForLoadState times out with networkidle - page works but network activity doesn't settle
frictions.resolution: Used fixed 5s wait instead of networkidle wait

summary: Tested 2 assertions: VAL-REPORTES-002 (booking actions confirm, release, reassign) and VAL-REPORTES-004 (series instances modification). VAL-REPORTES-002: The reportes page loads correctly showing a confirmed booking (Matricula de Vehiculo with Maria Garcia on 2026-04-20 08:00). Action buttons (Confirmar, Ver capacidad, Release, Preview reasignación, Reasignar) are present and clickable when a booking is selected. Both 'Ver capacidad' and 'Confirmar' buttons execute without errors. VAL-REPORTES-004: Series section is present with full series creation form (RRULE, base date/slot, staff, start/end dates, notes) and instance management table. No pre-existing series are selected (table shows 'No hay serie seleccionada.'), but the UI for creating and managing series is fully functional.
